regime_read: NQ leading / pulling away from ES — narrow, tech/AI-driven, FRAGILE. Trust directional moves less; watch for reversal when AI names cool.
narrative:
Macro backdrop —
[2026-06-20] US economic state (FRED):
  Growth: real GDP 1.6% (q/q ann)
  Inflation: CPI 3.9% YoY | core CPI 2.58% | core PCE 2.78% (Fed target 2%)
  Labor: unemployment 4.3%
  Rates: fed funds 3.63% | 10Y 4.49% | 10Y-2Y 0.27% (NORMAL)
  Consumer: UMich sentiment 49.8 | VIX 18.44

---
PRE-US-OPEN BRIEFING — ES/NQ (research only; no execution path on this pair). As of 2026-06-20 19:38 UTC.

1) RECENT MOVE-BY-MOVE READ. Both indices are firmly above their 200-day (ES +8.98%, NQ +17.98%) and in uptrend posture, with NQ stretched further from its long-run mean — a classic late-cycle tech-led extension. On the day, ES is +0.64% and NQ +1.27%, so NQ roughly doubled ES's gain; on the week NQ is +3.32% vs ES +1.63%. The likely catalyst cluster is AI/tech: the 'SpaceX stock joins AI bond frenzy' and NVIDIA driver/Blackwell headlines keep the AI-financing narrative hot, and that money is concentrating into the Nasdaq complex rather than broadening. Geopolitics is a tailwind, not a threat right now: oil is NOT spiking despite Iran shipping barrels (China cutting imports caps the price), and multiple headlines frame a war winding down — removing a key risk-off catalyst. Net: the tape has been grinding up on AI concentration with a benign macro/energy backdrop. Note ES last (7556.25) sits essentially ON its session VWAP (7559.65) while NQ (30647) trades above its VWAP (30583.61) — NQ is the stronger horse intraday.

2) VOLUME-PROFILE READ (where volume traded, NOT order-flow delta — true buy/sell aggression would require a CME order-flow feed; respect that limit). ES: 5-day POC 7631.58 with a value area of 7544.03–7644.08; ES last (7556) is in the LOWER third of value, just above VAL. High-volume nodes stack 7589–7631 ABOVE current price, meaning there's an accumulation/acceptance shelf overhead that price must reclaim — until then those nodes can act as supply on the way up and the line in the sand below is VAL ~7544. NQ: 5-day POC 30450.2, value area 30374.9–30876.9; NQ last (30647) is comfortably inside value, above POC, with heavy nodes both below (30450/30475) and above (30726/30826/30851). The NQ line in the sand is VAL 30374.9 — losing it puts price back below POC and flips the structure. Upside friction sits at the 30726–30851 node cluster, which also brackets prior-week high (30664.5) — that's the breakout test.

3) NQ/ES LEAD-LAG REGIME — CONCENTRATION. Contemporaneous correlation is high (0.944) and the lead-lag matrix peaks cleanly at lag 0 (0.768) with no meaningful predictive lead at any other lag (best_lag -3 at only -0.126, leader = NONE). The cumulative NQ-over-ES spread (+3.01% over 20d, +0.63% just on the 1d) confirms NQ is pulling away. This is the FRAGILE regime: narrow, AI-driven leadership. Implication — trust directional follow-through LESS and size DOWN. There is no exploitable lead-lag timing edge here (no clean leader), so this is a context filter, not a trigger. Reversals can be sharp the moment AI names cool, so concentration up-moves deserve tighter risk and faster profit-taking than a broad-breadth advance.

4) EVENT-CALENDAR AWARENESS. Nothing in the next ~9 sessions is high-impact, but the back half of the horizon is loaded: PCE (Fed's preferred inflation) ~Jun 30 (8:30 ET — reduce size into the window), ISM Manufacturing ~Jul 1 (reduce into the 10:00 ET print), and Nonfarm Payrolls ~Jul 3 (high-impact 8:30 ET — widen stops/size down). These are CADENCE ESTIMATES, not verified release dates — treat as approximate and confirm against the official calendar. For today's session there is no calendar-driven size penalty; the size penalty is the CONCENTRATION regime itself.

5) SYNTHESIS — META-REGIME + NARROWED BIAS. Meta-regime: trend-up + AI CONCENTRATION + benign macro/energy backdrop. News leans constructive (war de-escalation, no oil spike) and structure is bullish (above 200d, NQ above VWAP and POC), which argues for a modest LONG lean. BUT confidence is capped because the regime is explicitly fragile/narrow, RSI is neutral (ES 47, NQ 50.6 — no momentum thrust), ES is lagging and pinned to VWAP, and the lead-lag offers no clean directional edge. That is a MIXED, not clean, setup — so I keep confidence near coin-flip-plus. Bias: LONG-the-dip / hold-above-structure, ~52%, on the NQ side which is the leader. INVALIDATION: below NQ value-area-low 30374.9 (loss of POC support flips to neutral/short and signals the AI bid is cooling — exactly the concentration-reversal scenario to fear). Upside proof-of-trend: acceptance above the 30726–30851 node cluster / prior-week high 30664.5. HUMILITY NOTE: this briefing scorecard is n=6 (hit 0.833 but regime accuracy only 0.308) and is still CALIBRATING — these numbers are not yet statistically meaningful. This is INTELLIGENCE, not a validated edge; size accordingly and treat the regime tag as context, not a signal.
